meta.title: After Mosul: The Imperative of Bolstering U.S. Allies
meta.description: Dlawer Ala’Aldeen, Michael Pregent, Bilal Wahab, Dylan O’Driscoll, and Eric Brown discuss Kurdistan, Iraq, Mosul offensive against ISIS, and US policy.
